# GitHub Actions Workflows

This directory contains all GitHub Actions workflows for the Codeplane project.

## Runner Setup

All Linux jobs use the `isogonic` organization's self-hosted runners (24 runners on AMD EPYC-Genoa, 4 cores, 8GB RAM, 100GB volume attached).

macOS and Windows jobs use GitHub-hosted runners.

## Workflow Categories

- Release pipelines
- Platform builds
- Testing
- Quality gates
- Security
- Performance
- Maintenance
- Support
- Validation
